text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to shake off her disappointment, Narita
Brian is having difficulties applying herself to
training ever since she missed the chance to race
against Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take it upon myself to ask Symboli Rudolf for a
scrimmage, and we set up a match.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And the result—Narita Brian loses by a neck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she sees a much bigger gap in their
abilities and attributes the defeat to her
overconfidence. The two of us accept the loss and
use it as fuel to improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Narita Brian officially challenges
Symboli Rudolf, and word of this shocking
development spreads throughout the school.
